honour: # Post-nominal honours / orders that appear AFTER a name (e.g. "John Smith CBE"
# "Sir Tim Berners-Lee KBE FRS"). Matched case-insensitively as a standalone name
# token. A factual marker of membership of an order of chivalry / learned body —
# not a judgement of how a name sounds. Rarely typed into a checkout name field
# but a strong tell when present. Only distinctive honours are listed
# collisions with stray initials. EDIT to add more.
